title: Issue a surat from template and archive it for later retrieval
description: Verifies an operator can create a surat by selecting a template and resident, generate a PDF, and see the surat saved in the archive with a downloadable PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk using a valid NIK or name from the search results
Fill a valid value into the keperluan field
Generate the PDF for the surat
Click the navigation link to the surat archive
Verify the newly created surat appears in the archive list
Verify the archived surat provides a downloadable PDF

title: Sign in to access the dashboard overview
description: Verifies an operator can sign in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard where overview statistics are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard overview statistics are displayed

title: Block access to protected dashboard route while logged out
description: Verifies a logged-out user attempting to open a protected dashboard page is redirected to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Search archive by name, date range, and letter type then download PDF
description: Verifies the operator can filter the archive using name, date range, and letter type, open a result, and access the stored PDF for download.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk using a valid NIK or name from the search results
Fill a valid value into the keperluan field
Generate the PDF for the surat
Click the navigation link to the surat archive
Fill the name filter with a value taken from the selected penduduk
Select a valid start date in the date range filter
Select a valid end date in the date range filter
Select the same letter type used for creation in the letter type filter
Run the archive search
Open a surat from the filtered results
Verify the surat detail view shows metadata for the selected surat
Verify the detail view provides a downloadable stored PDF

title: Return to intended dashboard page after login from a protected route
description: Verifies a user redirected to login from a protected route can sign in and then reach a dashboard page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard/penduduk
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user is on a dashboard page
Verify the penduduk management view is displayed

title: Import penduduk from a valid spreadsheet and see records in the table
description: Verifies an operator can complete the import flow with a valid spreadsheet and the imported residents appear in the penduduk table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation option to open penduduk management
Start the import flow
Upload a valid spreadsheet file containing penduduk data
Confirm the import mapping or field confirmation step if shown
Verify the penduduk table shows newly imported records

title: View dashboard overview statistics after login
description: Verifies an authenticated operator can view the dashboard overview cards for total penduduk, total surat, and surat hari ini.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify dashboard overview statistics are displayed

title: Create surat shows required-field validation and succeeds after fixing
description: Verifies missing required fields in surat creation show validation errors and the surat can be generated successfully after completing required inputs.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk using a valid NIK or name from the search results
Attempt to generate or submit the surat with required fields still empty
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Fill all remaining required fields with valid values
Generate the PDF for the surat
Verify a PDF preview or generated document view is displayed

title: Browse penduduk table after authentication
description: Verifies an operator can access the penduduk management page and view the resident table.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation option to open penduduk management
Verify the penduduk table is displayed

title: Search penduduk by NIK populates surat form data
description: Verifies selecting a penduduk by NIK/name auto-fills the surat form with resident data so the operator does not need to retype it.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk by NIK
Select a penduduk from the search results
Verify the surat form shows resident identity fields populated from the selected penduduk

title: View recent archived surat when no search criteria is provided
description: Verifies the archive page shows recent surat items when the user does not enter any search criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the surat archive
Ensure search inputs are left empty
Run the search or refresh the archive list if needed
Verify a list of recent archived surat items is displayed

title: Open dashboard directly when already authenticated
description: Verifies a signed-in operator can open the dashboard route directly and see the overview statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify dashboard overview statistics are displayed

title: Preview surat before generating PDF
description: Verifies an operator can preview the surat content after filling inputs and before generating the final PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk using a valid NIK or name from the search results
Fill a valid value into the keperluan field
Open the surat preview
Verify a surat preview is displayed

title: Reject invalid credentials without signing in
description: Verifies the login form shows an invalid-credentials error and the user remains unauthenticated when incorrect credentials are submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid-user into the username field
Fill invalid-password into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible
Verify the user is not on the dashboard

title: Open archive item detail from list
description: Verifies a user can open an archived surat from the list and view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the surat archive
Open a surat item from the archive list
Verify the surat detail view is displayed

title: Show validation error for unsupported or invalid import file
description: Verifies the import flow blocks completion and shows a clear validation error when the uploaded file format or columns are invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation option to open penduduk management
Start the import flow
Upload a spreadsheet file with invalid columns or an unsupported format
Submit the import
Verify an import validation error explaining required format or columns is visible

title: Manual penduduk entry path allows surat generation (if supported)
description: Verifies the operator can proceed to generate a surat by manually entering resident details when not selecting a penduduk from search (if the UI supports manual entry).

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Choose the option to enter penduduk data manually if available
Fill valid values into the required resident identity fields
Fill a valid value into the keperluan field
Generate the PDF for the surat
Verify a PDF preview or generated document view is displayed

title: Prevent login submission with missing required fields
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission and shows validation feedback when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the user is not on the dashboard

title: Long keperluan text is accepted and can be generated into a PDF
description: Verifies the surat form accepts a long keperluan value and still generates a PDF without blocking the operator.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk using a valid NIK or name from the search results
Fill a very long text value into the keperluan field
Generate the PDF for the surat
Verify a PDF preview or generated document view is displayed

title: Cancel the import flow without changing the table
description: Verifies an operator can exit the import flow without importing and the penduduk table remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Click the navigation option to open penduduk management
Start the import flow
Cancel or close the import flow
Verify the import dialog or import step is no longer visible
Verify the penduduk table is still displayed

title: Special characters in filled fields do not block PDF generation
description: Verifies entering names/addresses with quotes or special characters in available fields still allows generating the surat PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to create a surat
Select a valid letter type template
Search for a penduduk using a valid NIK or name from the search results
Fill a value containing special characters into an editable text field available on the form
Fill a valid value into the keperluan field
Generate the PDF for the surat
Verify a PDF preview or generated document view is displayed

title: Preserve typed username when password is missing on submit
description: Verifies the username input is preserved after a blocked submission due to missing password so the user can complete sign-in efficiently.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify the username field still contains {{LOGIN_USER}}
